CalculateGeometryAttributes Hawii_reference_POIs "long POINT_X;lat POINT_Y" # # GEOGCS["GCS_WGS_1984",DATUM["D_WGS_1984",SPHEROID["WGS_1984",6378137.0,298.257223563]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],UNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]] "Same as input"
CalculateField Hawii_reference_POIs hl_link ""HI-" + str(!OBJECTID!)" "Python 3" # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

ExportFeatures Hawii_reference_POIs C:\Users\richard.gibbs\Documents\ArcGIS\Projects\PacNextGenInflows\PacNextGenInflows.gdb\HI_InflowsOutflows_hfv2 # NOT_USE_ALIAS "hl_link "hl_link" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,Hawii_reference_POIs,hl_link,0,254;multInt "multInt" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,Hawii_reference_POIs,multInt,-1,-1;FlowDir "FlowDir" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,Hawii_reference_POIs,FlowDir,-1,-1;long "long" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,Hawii_reference_POIs,long,-1,-1;lat "lat" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,Hawii_reference_POIs,lat,-1,-1;flag "flag" true true false 255 Text 0 0,First,#,Hawii_reference_POIs,flag,0,255" #
CalculateField HI_InflowsOutflows_hfv2 hl_link ""HI" + str(!OBJECTID!)" "Python 3" # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
JoinField HI_InflowsOutflows_hfv2 hl_link hi_ngen_nhdhr_v2_hydrolocations hl_link hf_id;poi_id;hl_uri "Select transfer fields" #
CalculateField HI_InflowsOutflows_hfv2 poi_id_str str(!poi_id!) "Python 3" # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
JoinField HI_InflowsOutflows_hfv2 poi_id_str hi_ngen_nhdhr_v2_flowpaths poi_id id;order "Select transfer fields" #
JoinField HI_InflowsOutflows_hfv2 flowpath_id hi_ngen_nhdhr_v2_flowpath_attributes link TopWdth;TopWdthCC "Select transfer fields" #
JoinField HI_InflowsOutflows_hfv2 hl_link Hawii_reference_POIs hl_link START_X;START_Y;END_X;END_Y;start_DomL;end_DomLoc "Select transfer fields" #
JoinField HI_InflowsOutflows_hfv2 hl_link Hawii_reference_POIs hl_link ID "Select transfer fields" #
JoinField HI_InflowsOutflows_hfv2 ref_ID hi_ref_usgs_flowlines ID START_X;START_Y;END_X;END_Y "Select transfer fields" #
JoinField HI_InflowsOutflows_hfv2 hl_link Hawii_reference_POIs hl_link ID "Select transfer fields" #
JoinField HI_InflowsOutflows_hfv2 ID hi_ref_usgs_flowlines ID START_X;START_Y;END_X;END_Y "Select transfer fields" #

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Area of feature in internal units squared.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.
